name: GH_CanvasChannel
summary: Enumerates all the drawing channels that are handled inside the Grasshopper canvas.

enum_values.name: First
enum_values.summary: First channel. At present, the first channel equals the Groups channel.

enum_values.name: Groups
enum_values.summary: Channel for Group outlines and name tags.

enum_values.name: Objects
enum_values.summary: Channels for Document Objects (components, parameters, special objects)

enum_values.name: Last
enum_values.summary: Last channel. At present, the last channel equals the Overlay channel.
